title: Time Zone Adjustments per Board
excerpt:
When I’m in travel it’s doesn’t make sense to change my computer time zone for Monday.com to work properly it’s need to be configured by Board.

posts.author: Yizhaq (Eliran Yizhaq)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I’m in travel it’s doesn’t make sense to change my computer time zone for Monday.com to work properly it’s need to be configured by Board.

Some time we may have projects around the world so when we setup board for the specific country we will be able to adjust the time zone.

I did tried to change the profile time zone but it didn’t work the only way right now for me to control the time zone on Monday.com is to change my computer time zone.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Eliran!

To confirm; when you changed your timezone in the monday settings, it didn’t work? Can you clarify a little bit about what happened here?

Were the date columns not updating properly?

Let me know so we can figure this out together!

posts.author: HPETRIE (Hannah Petrie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Charlotte Kirkham:

To confirm; when you changed your timezone in the monday settings

Hi @CharlotteK - Can you please provide instructions on how to update the timezone settings?
